Itslearning.RestApi.Entities.AggregatedOrganisation

Represents a site or school with IsFronterUpgradedSite flag.

NameDescriptionTypeAdditional information
IsFronterUpgradedSite

IsFronterUpgradedSite flag

 boolean

None.
IsParentAppEnabled

Determines whether parent app is enabled.

 boolean

None.
CustomerId

The customer id for the site.

 integer

None.
SiteName

The site name.

 string

None.
SchoolName

The school name. Only set if IsSite=false.

 string

None.
HierarchyId

The school id (hierarchy id). Will be 0 for sites.

 integer

None.
IsSite

True if Organisation is of type Site. False if Organisation is of type School.

 boolean

None.
